query:
SELECT 
  u.name,
  u.status as corretor_status,
  COUNT(l.id) as total_leads,
  SUM(CASE WHEN l.status != 'aguardando_atendimento' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as trabalhados,
  SUM(CASE WHEN l.status = 'aguardando_atendimento' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as aguardando,
  ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN l.status != 'aguardando_atendimento' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(l.id) * 100, 1) as pct_trabalhado,
  CASE WHEN COUNT(l.id) < 40 OR ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN l.status != 'aguardando_atendimento' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(l.id) * 100, 1) >= 90 THEN 'SIM' ELSE 'NAO' END as elegivel_90pct,
  CASE WHEN COUNT(l.id) < 40 OR ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN l.status != 'aguardando_atendimento' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(l.id) * 100, 1) >= 60 THEN 'SIM' ELSE 'NAO' END as elegivel_60pct
FROM users u
LEFT JOIN leads l ON l.corretorId = u.id AND l.naLixeira = 0
WHERE u.role = 'corretor'
GROUP BY u.id, u.name, u.status
ORDER BY total_leads DESC
LIMIT 20;

  SUM(CASE WHEN l.status = 'aguardando_atendimento' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as aguardando,
  ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN l.status != 'aguardando_atendimento' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(l.id) * 100, 1) as pct_trabalhado,
  CASE WHEN COUNT(l.id) < 40 OR ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN l.status != 'aguardando_atendimento' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(l.id) * 100, 1) >= 90 THEN 'SIM' ELSE 'NAO' END as elegivel_90pct,
  CASE WHEN COUNT(l.id) < 40 OR ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN l.status != 'aguardando_atendimento' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(l.id) * 100, 1) >= 60 THEN 'SIM' ELSE 'NAO' END as elegivel_60pct
FROM users u
LEFT JOIN leads l ON l.corretorId = u.id AND l.naLixeira = 0
WHERE u.role = 'corretor'
GROUP BY u.id, u.name, u.status
ORDER BY total_leads DESC
LIMIT 20;
